title: 5 Alimentos Sorpresa con Proteina
setting: Dark marble counter food photography set, consistent dramatic side lighting from the left, violet color grading, dark slate surface, same overhead camera angle, premium food photography studio

scenes.prompt: Dramatic overhead shot of diverse foods on dark marble surface with dramatic lighting, question mark made of protein powder, moody violet and coral accents, premium food photography, 9:16 vertical
scenes.text: 5 alimentos con MAS proteina de la que crees
scenes.voiceover: Cinco alimentos con mucha mas proteina de la que piensas.

scenes.prompt: Close-up of queso fresco and requesion in artisan bowl on dark slate, dramatic side lighting, violet color grading, premium food photography, Spanish cheese varieties, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: Numero uno: el requeson. Veintiocho gramos de proteina por taza. Mas que la mayoria de barritas.

scenes.prompt: Beautiful shot of Spanish canned tuna in premium dark presentation, fork resting beside, olive oil drizzle, moody dark background with coral accent light, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: Numero dos: atun en conserva. Veinte gramos por lata. Barato, rapido y en cualquier super.

scenes.prompt: Cinematic shot of Spanish lentil stew lentejas in dark ceramic bowl, steam rising, traditional Spanish kitchen with modern dark lighting, violet and coral accents, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: Numero tres: lentejas. Dieciocho gramos por plato. Clasico espanol que no falla.

scenes.prompt: Person using dark-themed nutrition app to scan plate of high-protein Spanish food, app showing macro breakdown, warm lifestyle lighting with coral accents, 9:16 vertical
scenes.voiceover: Guarda esta lista y trackea tu proteina con Cals2Gains. La IA cuenta por ti.
